tool_args.label: M15 Select Bus Service on First and Second Avenues
tool_args.raw_text: M15 Select Bus Service (SBS) along First and Second Avenues

payload.project_name: M15 Select Bus Service on First and Second Avenues
payload.description: Implementation of Select Bus Service on the M15 bus route along First and Second Avenues in Manhattan, including offset bus lanes, curbside bus lanes, off-board fare collection, transit signal priority, enhanced stations, new low-floor articulated buses, and complete streets elements including protected bicycle lanes and pedestrian safety islands.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On October 10, 2010, MTA New York City Transit (NYCT) and New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT) implemented the M15 Select Bus Service (SBS) along this route.
The M15 SBS improved bus speed and reliability through the use of proof-of-payment fare collection, new bus lanes, and improved bus lane treatments, including use of 'offset' bus lanes
